roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT MOT FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED TODAY IN RM 101
DA'S REPLY BRIEF; P&A IN SUPPT OF PC871,5 MOT FILED
PEOPLE'S OPENING BRIEF; MEMO P&A IN SUPPT OF 871,5 MOT FILED
DA MOT TO REIN COMPL PUR PC 871,5; RESTORE DEF TO PRIOR CUST STAT FILED
DEF MOT FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY FILED

/CAL: MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X: RONNIE WAGNER, WITH THE S,F,P,D, LEGAL DEPT,, IS PRESENT IN COURT,/MO GRTD/X: MOTION GRANTED AS TO THE CLOTHING SEIZED BY S,F,P,D, OFFICER, STAR #1528,/CTORD: THE MOTION IS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE, AS TO THE CELL PHONE, THE DEFENDANT LEFT THE COURTROOM INTHE MIDDLE OF THE HEARING/X: AN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT,/
/CAL: DA PC871,5 MOTION/DAWT/X: THE COURT SETS THE FOLLOWING BRIEFING SCHEDULE: 09-24-11 DA FILING, 10-11-11 RESPONSE BY DEFENDANT AND 10-20-11 DA REPLY/CONTD:11-03-11 HEARING ON 871,5PC/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X:SCOTT SIECARAK;VICTOR HUI,SFPD;AND MARVIN CABUNTERA, SFPD, SWORN ON BEHALF OF THE PEOPLE,/CAL: PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/X:ACTION DISMISSED, AS DA UNABLETO PROCEED,/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: ATTY SAMUEL LASSER SPECIALLY APPEARS FOR DEFENSE COUNSEL, V, ROY LEFCOURT,/X:THE DEFENSE'S ORAL MOTION FOR RELEASE ON OWN THEIRRECOGNIZANCE IS DENIED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 08-18-11/987,2/BAIL:225,000/SA1:ZHIFEI SONG, DANIEL LOURY, & SCOTT SIECZAREK, 150 YARDS/SAORD/CONTD: TO SET/DOP/TE:1 DAY/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:DEFENSE COUNSEL WILL SPEAK WITH DA, JENNIFER FROST/
/CAL:TO SET/TE:1 DAY/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:08-16-11FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
